title: Fraud awareness: good practice for education and training providers
body: "This guidance is for education and training providers who want more advice and support on the risk from fraud, including:   academy trusts colleges independent training providers   It provides:   general advice on fraud suggestions for developing counter fraud policies and approaches information on cyber related fraud   The guidance will be periodically reviewed to ensure it reflects up to date fraud risks and best practice. "

taxons.title: School and academy financial management and assurance
